steps: 50 µL, Aliquot 50ul of supernatant 1 well per sample into 96 well glass bottom plate Need pipet tips and 20-200ul pipet, 96well glass bottom plate Fishersci 07-000-633
Stick 96 well plate into machine for viral detection. 30 sec-1 min per run DOCI (Spec/Flour, Prototype DOCI imager, N/A, This is not commercially available, built in house)
